🎆 New Year's Day

A global start-of-year public holiday observed by businesses, schools and governments.

♀ International Women's Day

A global awareness and campaign day for gender equity, workplace culture and social programs.

🌱 Earth Day

A global environmental awareness day used by schools, NGOs, brands and cities.

🌍 World Environment Day

A UN-led environmental awareness day for sustainability campaigns and civic programs.

21. Juni 2026

🧘 International Yoga Day

A wellness and community participation day for health, fitness and lifestyle campaigns.

27. Nov. 2026

⚡ Black Friday

Peak promotional event following US Thanksgiving, important for ecommerce, stores and affiliate content.

Details
30. Nov. 2026

💻 Cyber Monday

Online retail and subscription offer planning day after Black Friday weekend.

25. Dez. 2026

A major global public holiday and one of the largest travel, retail, family and religious periods of the year.
